features.featureTitle: Audit and fix all TypeScript compilation errors in the frontend so the build pipeline completes successfully. Specifically: ensure `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` correctly maps the backend Candid interface for `addRecord` and `getAllRecords`; ensure the `HealthRecord` TypeScript type exactly matches all backend fields; and ensure `RiskPredictor.tsx`, `Dashboard.tsx`, `History.tsx`, and `XRayAnalysis.tsx` all compile without type errors. The `npm run build` command must succeed with zero errors.
